refs.description: Enrolment landing page (ELP) with a free-trial promotional hero — 'Try 14 days free, then S$2.00/mo.' CTA. Shows monthly perks list (Indrive rides, restaurant discounts, free delivery) and surprise perks teaser. Use as the reference for any ELP variant that leads with a free-trial offer.

Enrolment landing page (ELP) with segmented pricing — shows the promotional price (S$2.00/mo.) in a sticky bottom bar alongside a 'Select plan' button. Perks list is identical to the promo ELP. Use when the ELP must surface a specific price tier without a free-trial CTA.

Partnership enrolment landing page for DBS Yuu — headline 'Get pandapro at only S$1.99/mo. with DBS Yuu'. Lists partner-exclusive benefits (restaurant discounts, platform fee waiver, exclusive vouchers) and payment instructions requiring DBS Yuu card. Use as the reference for any bank/partner co-branded enrolment screen.

Payment checkout screen for a free-trial plan — shows the trial timeline (today → day 11 reminder → day 15 renewal), a renewal plan selector (1-month / 6-month / 12-month with savings badges), saved payment method, consent checkboxes, and a 'Confirm and start free trial' CTA with the total showing 'Free for 14 days'. Use as the reference for any free-trial payment confirmation flow.

Payment checkout screen for a paid (non-trial) plan — shows a promotional banner, plan selector (1-month / 6-month / 12-month), saved payment method, consent checkboxes, and a 'Subscribe at S$2.00/mo.' CTA. Use as the reference for direct-paid subscription confirmation without a free trial.

Restaurant detail page (RDP) with a sticky bottom upsell banner — 'Save with PRO! Get it at S$2.00/mo. for 6 months' displayed above the cart bar. Use as the reference for the in-session subscription upsell sticky banner placement on the RDP.

RDP 1-click subscription interstitial — full-screen purple overlay surfaced mid-checkout, headline 'Save S$8.00 more now', shows 14-day free trial terms, perk icons, pre-filled payment method, and dual CTAs ('Try 14 days free' / 'Continue without pandapro'). Use as the reference for the 1-click upsell interstitial on the RDP.

RDP 1-click subscription success state — overlay shows 'Nice! You're saving S$8.00 more with PRO' with the pandapro card illustration and a reminder about the free-trial end email. Single CTA 'Proceed to cart'. Use as the reference for the post-enrolment success state within the RDP 1-click flow.

Unsubscription retention screen showing realised savings — headline 'You've saved S$26.50 since you've been pro!' with an itemised breakdown (restaurant orders, delivery discounts) and dual CTAs: 'Keep my plan' (primary) and 'Proceed with unsubscribing' (secondary). Use as the reference for the savings-summary retention step in the cancellation flow.

Unsubscription retention screen with a 50%-off resubscription offer — one-time offer badge, 'Stay on the pro lane for 50% off', shows discounted price and urgency copy ('Claim your offer in 24 hours'). Use as the reference for a price-discount retention offer during cancellation.

Unsubscription retention screen with a segmented renewal offer — 'Don't miss out on renewing at S$2.00/mo. for the next 3 months', shows the discounted vs. standard price and a 75% renewal discount callout. Use as the reference for a segment-specific price retention screen in the cancellation flow.

Unsubscription retention screen highlighting remaining subscription time — 'You still have 12 days left', prompts user to place 2 more pro orders before cancelling and shows the cancel deadline date. Use as the reference for the time-remaining retention nudge step in the cancellation flow.

Unsubscription exit survey — 'Tell us why you're leaving' with a checklist of churn reasons (didn't save enough, minimum order too high, offers not attractive, limited restaurants, prefers other platforms, lifestyle changed, others) and a Skip option. Use as the reference for the cancellation reason survey screen.
